subject: Free SkyDock Radio- While Supplies Last
body:
Exclusive Offer 

Get a FREE* SkyDock! 
(Just pay shipping & processing. Subscription sold separately.)

To show you our appreciation, we are giving away a FREE* XM SkyDock to
our loyal listeners.  Act fast while supplies last! 

Get My Free SkyDock!
http://email.siriusxm.com/a/tBSfVm3B7gW-gB82VJbNswCpzoy/shopt1 

With the holidays fast approaching, this unique and practical radio - a
$50 value - is free* to you as a gift from us. It's an easy and
convenient way to add Satellite Radio to your second car, and it makes a
great gift for friends and family! The XM SkyDock allows you to enjoy
Live Satellite Radio anywhere you drive using your iPod Touch or iPhone
through your existing vehicle radio with easy Do-It-Yourself
installation.

For additional product features, specifications, support information,
and compatibility requirements, click here.
http://email.siriusxm.com/a/tBSfVm3B7gW-gB82VJbNswCpzoy/shopt2

To claim this offer, choose one of the following options:

- Online: through the SiriusXM Shop 

Take me to the SiriusXM Shop
http://email.siriusxm.com/a/tBSfVm3B7gW-gB82VJbNswCpzoy/shopt3 

- By telephone: call 1-888-635-5112 and provide Access Code: 36870.

Thank you for being a loyal SiriusXM subscriber!

------------------------------------------------------------

*OFFER DETAILS:Must be a current subscriber to redeem this offer. Order
a SkyDock radio until 12/31/2013, 11:59pm ET and the radio is on us (a
$49.99 value). You pay shipping and processing costs for the radio.
Radios purchased will be shipped to you pre-activated with your
subscription, if selected, either 7 days after the ship date on your
packing slip or when you call to activate (whichever occurs first).
Subscription plans purchased with a radio will include a $75 early
termination fee for failure to maintain 12 consecutive months of
service.
Service will automatically renew and bill at then-current rates until
you call us at 1-866-635-2349 to cancel. See our Customer Agreement for
complete terms at www.siriusxm.com. Fees and taxes apply. Offers cannot
be combined. Limit 2 radios per household. All fees and programming
subject to change.
http://email.siriusxm.com/a/tBSfVm3B7gW-gB82VJbNswCpzoy/sxm
------------------------------------------------------------

You are receiving this email because you previously indicated that you'd
like to receive email updates from SiriusXM Radio. If you no longer wish
to receive our email newsletter, you may unsubscribe here.
http://email.siriusxm.com/a/tBSfVm3B7gW-gB82VJbNswCpzoy/unsub?password=B7gW-gNswCpzBSfVm3s3Cvne9qzHMt

NOTE: Please allow up to 10 business days for your preferences to be
applied. You may still receive service-related emails if the email
address is associated with your subscriber account. 

Have you moved or changed your billing information? Please take a minute
now to update your account information.
http://email.siriusxm.com/a/tBSfVm3B7gW-gB82VJbNswCpzoy/update

You can read our entire Privacy Policy.
http://email.siriusxm.com/a/tBSfVm3B7gW-gB82VJbNswCpzoy/privacy

(C) 2013 Sirius XM Radio Inc. Sirius, XM and all related marks and logos
are trademarks of Sirius XM Radio Inc. and its subsidiaries. All other
marks, channel names and logos are the property of their respective
owners. All rights reserved.

If you are unable to see the message below, click here to view.  



With the holidays fast approaching, this unique and practical radio - a $50 value - is free* to you as a gift from us.

It's an easy and convenient way to add Satellite Radio to your second car, and it makes a great gift for friends and family!

The XM SkyDock allows you to enjoy Live Satellite Radio anywhere you drive using your iPod Touch or iPhone through your existing vehicle radio with easy Do-It-Yourself installation.

For additional product features, specifications, support information, and compatibility requirements,
click here.

To claim this offer, choose one of the following options:

• Online: through the SiriusXM Shop


• By telephone: call 1-888-635-5112 and provide Access Code: 36870.


Thank you for being a loyal SiriusXM subscriber!



*OFFER DETAILS: Must be a current subscriber to redeem this offer. Order a SkyDock radio until 12/31/2013, 11:59pm ET and the radio is on us (a $49.99 value). You pay shipping and processing costs for the radio. Radios purchased will be shipped to you pre-activated with your subscription, if selected, either 7 days after the ship date on your packing slip or when you call to activate (whichever occurs first). Subscription plans purchased with a radio will include a $75 early termination fee for failure to maintain 12 consecutive months of service. Service will automatically renew and bill at then-current rates until you call us at 1-866-635-2349 to cancel. See our Customer Agreement for complete terms at www.siriusxm.com. Fees and taxes apply. Offers cannot be combined. Limit 2 radios per household. All fees and programming subject to change.
